arts.ttl: Chris Sutton reacts after Celtic win red card appeal for Daizen Maeda to play v Bayern Munich
arts.sum: That’s just the news Celtic fans wanted to hear ahead of the visit of Bayern Munich in the Champions League! Celtic win red card appeal for Daizen Maeda to face Bayern Munich in Champions League

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen goalkeeper Lukáš Hrádecký: Win or concede the title to Bayern Munich
arts.sum: While Leverkusen’s magical run to last season’s title looked like a shift in the power dynamics in the Bundesliga, Bayern bounced back this season and hold a commanding eight-point lead at the top of the table ahead of the showdown this weekend. On September 30th, 2022, Bayern Munich defeated Bayer Leverkusen 4-0.

arts.ttl: Celtic vs Bayern Munich LIVE: Champions League updates, latest team news, TV, prediction
arts.sum: Scottish champions host German giants in huge clash

arts.ttl: Former Celtic player warns Bayern Munich about what Hoops will do to themselves to win Champions League tie
arts.sum: And Burke has told Bayern – following his Werder Bremen’s 3-0 defeat at the Allianz Arena last weekend – that Rodgers ‘ team will be willing to go the extra mile to gain a positive result in Scotland to take over to Germany. Burke believes Celts will be willing to “tear themselves apart” against Bayern in a bid to win the glamour tie.

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson visited Celtic Park to witness Vincent Kompany nightmare in person as Bayern boss bares all
arts.sum: The Belgian will arrive in the east end of Glasgow with the Bavarian giants and he has a story to tell

arts.ttl: Kris Boyd drops Celtic truth bombs as he fumes at Rangers losing to Queen's Park
arts.sum: Usually, Rodgers would have seen off Clement, but somehow, he is still in the job and Boyd agreed that the Queen’s Park loss is ‘one of the most embarrassing in the club’s history’, as he told Sky Sports News (10/02/25 at 1:15 pm). Lost the League Cup final to Celtic and are now knocked out of the Scottish Cup. We aren’t even in the middle of February and domestically it’s over for Rangers already.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich slapped with Celtic quadruple injury blow as £42m star OUT of Champions League blockbuster
arts.sum: The German heavyweights travel to Glasgow with a slightly lighter squad than usual

arts.ttl: Celtic handed humungous boost for Bayern Champions League tie, Daizen Maeda update
arts.sum: A further ban was imposed on the player for endangering an opponent as UEFA confirmed to the club as they outlined a further match suspension. Celtic were all set to head into their Champions League tie with Bayern Munich with one of their key players sidelined.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich's Serge Gnabry on Bayer Leverkusen, the UEFA Champions League, fashion and more
arts.sum: bundesliga.com: In general, for you personally, what makes a good rivalry in football? bundesliga.com: One team that’s trying to hinder you again this year is Bayer Leverkusen, your main rivals again this year.
